headline: General Electric (GE) Updates By Laws And Dividend, Is The Stock Above Fair Value?
summary: General Electric (GE) is back in focus after its board approved amendments to the company’s by-laws and reaffirmed a quarterly cash dividend, giving investors fresh information on both governance and income policy. See our latest analysis for General Electric.
